arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works S7E24: Expectations for Bayern Munich’s second half; Will the bevy of contract situations be a distraction?; Should Bayern wait until 2026 for Florian Wirtz?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. Bayern Munich is back in action this week, but what should fans expect from the group by the end of the season?

arts.ttl: Borussia Mönchengladbach's 5 best wins over Bayern Munich
arts.sum: With Borussia Dortmund also taking six points from Bayern that year, they remain the last two teams to beat the record champions home and away in a single season. It looked as if Bayern would cruise to another victory over BMG when August Starek opened the scoring after just 11 minutes, but Gladbach rallied to claim their first ever win over the Bavarians.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Manuel Neuer, Sven Ulreich prep to re-up with Bayern Munich; Liverpool open to Federico Chiesa sale; VfB Stuttgart getting help; Arsenal wants Nico Williams; Manchester United eyeing Victor Osimhen; and MORE!
arts.sum: As expected, it looks like Manuel Neuer and Sven Ulreich are going to run it back at Bayern Munich for one more year per kicker journalist Georg Holzner: The moves have been expected, but are likely coming closer to being official closed, which provides two-third of the game plan for who will be on the roster at goalkeeper next season.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala tries not think back at the infamous handball non-call of Spain’s Cucurella, knows he did all he could
arts.sum: Then, in the 105th minute, the ball fell to Germany forward Jamal Musiala in the box, he rocketed a shot that was heading into the far corner of the net before Spain defender Marc Cucurella drew his arm in and blocked the ball. Play is waved on, Spain would score a last minute winner and Germany would exit the tournament think of what could have been.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich loan Socceroos prodigy Irankunda to Grasshoppers
arts.sum: Jochen Sauer, director of youth development at Bayern, said: "Nestory has integrated very well after his move from Australia to Europe and has repeatedly shown his great talent with our reserves. Socceroos star Nestory Irankunda is celebrating a loan move to Swiss outfit Grasshoppers, believing his switch from Bayern Munich will only boost his global footballing education.

arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich stalwart Javi Martinez reveals talk with “star” Bryan Zaragoza, told him to be patient
arts.sum: As a controversial transfer from Spain, bought after an abysmal trophyless season, it took the tough and gritty Spaniard a while to get used to life in Munich, rotating in and out of the starting XI in his first few months at the club. So he noticed when Bayern controversially signed another young, unproven Spaniard in Bryan Zaragoza, watching as he struggled to help the club during an abysmal trophyless season and not getting the chance to bed in.

arts.ttl: Didi Hamann predicting tight Bundesliga race between Bayern Munich, Bayer Leverkusen amid potential for distractions
arts.sum: One of the reasons that Hamann thinks Bayern Munich will not be able to runaway with the league is because of the multitude of open contract situations going on at the moment. With so many key players trying to negotiate new deals, Hamann thinks focus could be an issue.

arts.ttl: BFW 2025 Hot Takes: Bayern Munich youngster Jonah Kusi-Asare has the potential to be the successor to Harry Kane
arts.sum: But it is also important to identify talent when one has it and Kusi-Asare has so much of it that he has the potential to replace even a player as good as Kane one day. In the January of 2023, the Bavarians signed striker Jonah Kusi-Asare for an initial €4 million with another €2.5 million in potential add ons.

arts.ttl: RB Salzburg vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, & more!
arts.sum: Picking up right where they left off, Bayern will start the year with a friendly against the Austrian version of the Red Bull family, RB Salzburg. Based on his recent conversation with Vincent Kompany, Mathys Tel might play the entire 90 minutes by starting at left wing and moving up to forward to relieve Harry Kane.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich lurking in the background of Florian Wirtz negotiations with Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: According to a report from Sport Bild, Bayern Munich is staying closely tied to Florian Wirtz as he works through negotiations with Bayer Leverkusen. Also, be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.
